common.disclaimer: This is for informational purposes only. Please consult a licensed healthcare professional for medical advice.
common.notDiagnosis: This is NOT a medical diagnosis. Always consult a healthcare professional.
common.consultDoctor: This is for awareness only. Please consult a licensed doctor.
common.consultPharmacist: Always consult your pharmacist or doctor about medicine safety.
common.verifyMedicine: Always verify medicine availability and dosage with your pharmacist.
common.aiDisclaimer: This tool uses AI to suggest possibilities and is NOT a medical diagnosis.

nav.uploadFirst: Upload a prescription first to unlock this section

landing.heroTitle: Everything You Need for Better Health
landing.heroDesc: Comprehensive tools designed to make healthcare accessible and understandable
landing.smartReportDesc: Upload prescriptions, lab reports, and X-rays for AI-powered insights
landing.aiAssistantDesc: Get answers to your health questions in your language
landing.nearbyCareDesc: Find hospitals, clinics, and pharmacies near you with directions
landing.findDoctorsDesc: Search specialists by condition, view ratings, and call directly
landing.safePrivateDesc: Your health data is encrypted and never shared without consent

upload.pasteLink: Paste a link to your medical document...
upload.reviewExtracted: Review and confirm the medicines extracted from your prescription
upload.reviewRequired: Review required - some medicines need confirmation

settings.title: Settings
settings.darkModeDesc: Toggle between light and dark themes
settings.dataPrivacyDesc: Your health data is protected with row-level security. Only you can access your medical reports, medicines, and health records.

help.title: Help & Safety
help.description: Emergency contacts and important safety information
help.dataSecureDesc: All health data is encrypted using industry-standard protocols. Row-level security ensures only you can access your data. We never share your information without explicit consent.
help.mentalHealthDesc: If you're experiencing a mental health crisis, please reach out to a helpline. You can call iCall at 9152987821 or Vandrevala Foundation at 1860-2662-345.
help.medicalDisclaimerDesc: VitalWave AI provides health information for awareness only. It is NOT a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider.
